message:
🌱 Add backstage: [Plugin] Datadog Integration mission (#910)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "backstage-849-plugin-datadog-integration",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "backstage: [Plugin] Datadog Integration",
+    "description": "A Datadog plugin for Backstage that embeds Datadog dashboards, metrics, and graphs directly into the Backstage service catalog, allowing developers to monitor service health from a single pane of glass. Requested by 42+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Backstage setup",
+        "description": "Verify your Backstage installation is running:\n```bash\n# If running via Docker:\ndocker ps | grep backstage\n\n# If deployed on Kubernetes:\nkubectl get pods -n backstage\n```\nThis plugin requires a running Backstage instance and a Datadog account."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Install the Datadog plugin",
+        "description": "Add the Datadog plugin to your Backstage app. A community-maintained plugin is available from Roadie:\n```bash\ncd packages/app\nyarn add @roadiehq/backstage-plugin-datadog\n```\nSee the Backstage Plugin Marketplace for the latest available Datadog integration plugins."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Configure the Datadog integration",
+        "description": "Annotate your catalog entities with the Datadog dashboard URL:\n```yaml\napiVersion: backstage.io/v1alpha1\nkind: Component\nmetadata:\n  annotations:\n    datadoghq.com/dashboard-url: 'https://p.datadoghq.com/sb/your-dashboard-id'\n```\nThe plugin embeds Datadog dashboards as iframes in the entity page. You may need to configure Datadog's embeddable/public dashboard sharing for this to work."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the Datadog plugin works",
+        "description": "Open Backstage and navigate to a service entity that has Datadog annotations:\n1. Check that the Datadog tab or card appears on the entity page\n2. Verify that the embedded Datadog dashboard loads correctly\n3. Confirm that metrics and graphs from Datadog are visible"
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "A community-maintained Datadog plugin for Backstage embeds Datadog dashboards and graphs directly into the service catalog entity pages. Annotate catalog entities with datadoghq.com/dashboard-url to link them to embeddable Datadog dashboards.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "backstage",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "backstage"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/backstage/backstage/issues/849",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/backstage/backstage"
+    },
+    "reactions": 42,
+    "comments": 17,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "docker"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Backstage instance (via Docker, npx @backstage/create-app, or Kubernetes) and a Datadog account with dashboard sharing enabled."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:21:00.572Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
